mapper.select: SELECT * FROM resource_emotion_arc WHERE resource_id = #{resourceId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO resource_emotion_arc (arc_id, resource_id, arc_json, generate_status, error_message, ai_model, token_usage, generate_time) VALUES (#{arcId}, #{resourceId}, #{arcJson}, #{generateStatus}, #{errorMessage}, #{aiModel}, #{tokenUsage}, #{generateTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE resource_emotion_arc SET arc_json = #{arcJson}, generate_status = #{generateStatus}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, ai_model = #{aiModel}, token_usage = #{tokenUsage}, generate_time = #{generateTime} WHERE resource_id = #{resourceId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM resource_emotion_arc WHERE arc_id = #{arcId} AND deleted = 0
